blocks.text: Match preview: Surrey face Leicestershire in Group A (ODI) on Fri, 24 Jul, 2026, 3:30 pm at Woodbridge Road Guildford. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Overcast · High 28°C / Low 17°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 19 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
